title: Live Takeover
blurb: A live takeover — streaming right now on INTERDEPENDENT.
_help: GO-LIVE state: channel takeover + WARNING regime (snow+IV-logo bookend, full-screen card at start + every 10 min, ticker crawl at the 5-min mark; plots/subs/season banners yield only while a warning element is up). To END and return to the Dan Schott takeover: cp live.dan-schott.json live.json && wrangler pages deploy . --project-name=interdependent-tv --branch=main
